response.overview: # Translation  The story of Adam, a widower with three children after divorcing his unfaithful ex-wife Ika, who cheated on him with Adam's best friend Amri. Heartbroken and hurt by his ex-wife, Adam plans never to fall in love with another woman again. But the arrival of Adel, who becomes the caregiver for his children, heals the wounds in Adam's heart and his children's hearts. Love at first sight? Nonsense! For Adam to fall in love a second time seemed impossible. However, no one expected that Adam would fall for his own children's babysitter. A tomboy babysitter at that. Limited edition! "Walaweh, is this a house or a zoo?" - Adel "What? Zoo? Wow, you've just started working and already complaining?" - Adam Adel hates being constantly bullied by Adam. She wants to fight back, but fears getting fired. She's already tired of changing jobs. Eventually, Adel has no choice but to accept Adam's difficult attitude. "You're so fierce, miss. Did you swallow a hornet's nest or something?
response.title: Jodohku Babysitter
